gold: Hayır yanlış yazdın. Tamamen yanlış almışsın, tekrar söylüyorum, harf harf kodluyorum. Adana, Hatay, Muğla, Edirne, Trabzon nokta Adana, Rize, Samsun, Lüleburgaz, Adana, Niğde at email nokta com.
predicted: Hayır, hayır, yanlış anlama. Tamamen yanlış anlamışsın. Tekrar söylüyorum. Hayfa kodluyorum. adanahataymuğlaedirnetrabzon.adanarizesamsunlüleburgazadananide@email.com

sigWerErrors.reason: Repeating 'hayır' (no) does not change the overall meaning, just adds emphasis.
'yazdın' means 'you wrote', 'anlama' means 'understand'; this changes the meaning of the sentence significantly.
'almışsın' means 'you took', 'anlamışsın' means 'you understood'; this changes the meaning of the sentence.
'harf' means 'letter', 'hayfa' is a city name and not relevant here; this is a significant error in the context of spelling.
Omitting 'harf' (letter) removes important context about spelling out the word.
Combining multiple city names into one word makes the spelling sequence incoherent and unusable.
Omitting a city name from the spelling sequence changes the intended code and is a significant error.
